title: Front Office Manager - Pugmarks India International Enterprises - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Pugmarks India International Enterprises - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Pugmarks India International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Pugmarks India International Enterprises:
Pugmarks India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pugmarks India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
